title: Export a Module
description:
Welcome to Rank Challenge. This module defines a `greet` function, but it never exports it, so `require('./greet')` returns an empty object.

In CommonJS, a module only exposes what you attach to `module.exports`. Add a line that exports the `greet` function so other files can use it.
hints: Node uses CommonJS by default. Whatever you assign to `module.exports` is what `require()` returns.
Add `module.exports = greet;` at the bottom of the file.

parseRules.failMessage: The exported function must be named `greet`.
